orchestrator_notes: Agents: Read this file BEFORE starting. If orchestrator_directives contains STOP, halt immediately. This series fixes gaps from the 0870 audit. Key patterns: use TintedChip.vue and TintedBadge.vue (created in 0871a) instead of inline tinted markup. Use getAgentBadgeStyle() from @/utils/colorUtils instead of local functions. Use global .text-muted-a11y class instead of scoped *-text-muted classes. Pill-button style: border-radius 9999px, padding 8px 18px, active = rgba(255,195,0,0.12) bg + #ffc300 text, inactive = transparent + #8895a8 + smooth-border.
